positive: A whimsical flat lay illustration perfect for stickers or patches. Subject: a picnic basket filled with perfectly arranged items (vintage teapot, fresh berries, retro books, and checkered blanket). Bright, cheerful color palette, clean vector style, isometric perspective, storybook quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
